text: SYS_HEADER_1 PRIVACY IN THE AGE OF AI Posted on June 12, 2025 As large language models become ubiquitous, the question of data sovereignty has never been more pressing. We must consider how our personal information is ingested, processed, and stored by these digital giants. SYS_HEADER_2 THE IMPORTANCE OF THE EDGE Edge-based computing offers a potential solution by keeping sensitive data on the user's device. By filtering information before it ever reaches the cloud, we can protect our most intimate details.
semantic:
# Privacy in the Age of AI

Posted on June 12, 2025

As large language models become ubiquitous, the question of data sovereignty has never been more pressing.

We must consider how our personal information is ingested, processed, and stored by these digital giants.

## The Importance of the Edge

Edge-based computing offers a potential solution by keeping sensitive data on the user's device.

By filtering information before it ever reaches the cloud, we can protect our most intimate details.
label: digestible_article

text: SYS_HEADER_1 NEW REGULATIONS IMPACTING DIGITAL SERVICES By Staff Reporter Legislators today introduced a new bill aimed at curbing the influence of data brokers. The bill, if passed, would require explicit consent for the sale of personal information. Industry experts are divided on the potential impact of this legislation. SYS_HEADER_3 RELATED STORIES - STRUCT_LINK_ELEMENTEverything you need to know about the privacy bill /news/privacy-bill-explained - STRUCT_LINK_ELEMENTData brokers react to new legislation /news/data-brokers-reaction
semantic:
# New Regulations Impacting Digital Services

By Staff Reporter

Legislators today introduced a new bill aimed at curbing the influence of data brokers.

The bill, if passed, would require explicit consent for the sale of personal information.

Industry experts are divided on the potential impact of this legislation.

### Related Stories

- [Everything you need to know about the privacy bill](/news/privacy-bill-explained)
- [Data brokers react to new legislation](/news/data-brokers-reaction)
label: digestible_article

By Jane Doe May 18, 2024 --- In the rapidly evolving landscape of digital media, a new trend is emerging. SYS_HEADER_2 THE SHIFT TO INDEPENDENCE According to recent data, the number of independent newsletters has grown by 40% year-over-year. - Editorial Freedom: Writers can cover niche topics without corporate oversight. - Direct Monetization: Subscription models allow for sustainable income. > "The relationship between a writer and their audience is the most valuable asset in modern journalism." semantic:
# The Future of Decentralized News

### How independent journalists are reclaiming the narrative in 2024.

By Jane Doe May 18, 2024

---

In the rapidly evolving landscape of digital media, a new trend is emerging.

## The Shift to Independence

According to recent data, the number of independent newsletters has grown by 40% year-over-year.

- **Editorial Freedom:** Writers can cover niche topics without corporate oversight.
- **Direct Monetization:** Subscription models allow for sustainable income.

> "The relationship between a writer and their audience is the most valuable asset in modern journalism."

[Subscribe Now](https://yourpublication.substack.com/subscribe)
label: digestible_article
